resources.string: No auth token available. Please log in.
Your cancellation request for order {order_id} has been approved.
A retailer has requested cancellation for order {order_id}. Review and approve or deny.
Order {order_id} is awaiting cash collection for {amount_minor}.
Order {order_id} was delivered on credit and is awaiting supplier review.
Credit delivery for order {order_id} was {action} by supplier.
Credit delivery for order {order_id} was {action} by supplier.
{lock_type} lock activated by {locked_by}. New orders are queued until the lock is released.
{lock_type} lock released by {locked_by}. Queued orders are available for dispatch.
The driver has arrived for order {order_id}. Please prepare for delivery.
Driver {driver_name} ({phone}) has been added to your fleet.
You have been assigned route {route_id} with {order_count} orders. Check your route for details.
Driver {driver_name} is back online and available for dispatch.
Supplier approved early completion for {remaining_count} remaining orders. Return to your home node.
Driver requested early route completion. Reason: {reason}. {remaining_count} orders remain.
Factory {factory_name} is now active ({warehouses_linked} warehouses linked).
Factory manifest {route_id} created with {stop_count} convoy stops.
Override quota is at {count_24h} of {quota} in 24 hours on manifest {manifest_id}. Investigate the loading bay.
AI worker paused for scope {scope} during manual dispatch.
AI worker resumed for scope {scope}. Dispatch automation is back online.
Order {order_id} payment is confirmed. Continue route execution.
Payment for order {order_id} was completed successfully.
Manifest {manifest_id} was cancelled ({reason}). {released_count} orders were released.
Manifest {manifest_id} closed: all {stop_count} stops were delivered.
Manifest {manifest_id} departed the gate with {stop_count} stops.
Order {order_id} on manifest {manifest_id} exceeded the retry threshold and requires intervention.
Manifest {manifest_id} draft created with {stop_count} planned stops.
Exception {reason} occurred on order {order_id} in manifest {manifest_id}.
Order {order_id} has been moved to a new manifest. ETA may shift.
Driver reported {item_count} missing items from order {order_id} after sealing.
A quantity change has been proposed for your order {order_id}.
Driver proposed quantity changes for order {order_id}. Review and approve or reject.
Supplier {action} your quantity negotiation for order {order_id}.
Offload confirmed for order {order_id}. Payment flow is now active.
Order {order_id} has been amended. No refund required.
Order {order_id} has been amended. Refund of {refunded_minor} applied for returned items.
Order {order_id} was cancelled by origin: {reason}. Pending payment was voided.
Order {order_id} was cancelled and removed from active flow.
Your order {order_id} has been delivered successfully.
Your order has been dispatched on route {route_id}. {order_count} orders are on the way.
Order {order_id} has been reassigned to your route. Check route updates.
Order {order_id} has been reassigned to another driver and removed from your route.
Your checkout was blocked because all requested items are out of stock at warehouse {warehouse_id}.
Retailer checkout was blocked because all requested items are out of stock at warehouse {warehouse_id}.
Order {order_id} was removed from manifest {manifest_id} because of payload overflow and queued for redispatch.
Route {route_id} has {order_count} orders ready for payload sealing. Proceed to the loading dock.
Order {order_id} was sealed by terminal {terminal_id} and is ready for dispatch.
Payment for order {order_id} was completed using bypass verification.
Order {order_id} was completed with payment bypass confirmation.
Supplier issued a payment bypass token for order {order_id}.
Payment for order {order_id} via {gateway} failed: {reason}. Please try again.
Payment of {amount_minor} received for order {order_id} via {gateway}.
Payment confirmed for your delivery. You may proceed to complete the order.
Driver reported a probable power outage at retailer for order {order_id}.
Your scheduled order {order_id} has been accepted and is now being prepared for delivery on {delivery_date}.
You confirmed your scheduled order {order_id}. It will be auto-accepted when the delivery date approaches.
Your scheduled order {order_id} has been updated.
A custom price has been set for you on product {sku_id}.
Custom pricing for product {sku_id} has been removed. Standard pricing applies.
Account {shop_name} registered. You can now place orders.
Route {route_id} is ready with {stop_count} planned stops.
Order {order_id} was escalated for immediate supplier action.
Order {order_id} was escalated for immediate supplier action.
Driver reported shop closed for order {order_id}. Attempt {attempt_id} requires follow-up.
Order {order_id} shop-closed case was resolved by Admin: {action}.
Shop-closed case for order {order_id} was resolved as {resolution}.
Shop-closed case for order {order_id} was resolved as {resolution}.
Driver reported shop closed for order {order_id}. Attempt {attempt_id} requires follow-up.
Order {order_id} was completed via SMS fallback confirmation.
Driver completed order {order_id} using SMS quick-complete fallback.
Split payment created for order {order_id}: first {first_amount_minor}, second {second_amount_minor}.
Split payment created for order {order_id}: first {first_amount_minor}, second {second_amount_minor}.
Backorder {backorder_id} was created from shortfall handling.
Transit estimate updated for lane {lane_id} to {new_dampened_hours}h.
Vehicle {vehicle_label} ({license_plate}) has been added to your fleet.
Warehouse {warehouse_name} is now active for supplier operations.
Warehouse {warehouse_id} has been disabled. Orders may be rerouted.
Cached manifest is older than 15 minutes. Cannot proceed offline.
Inject order queued. Will sync when connection restores.
Immutable timeline of security and operational mutations.
Sends push + notification records to all users in target role.
Generates a 6-digit bypass token for an order in AWAITING_PAYMENT.
Data must be a JSON object
Runs explicit reconciliation for a stuck payment session.
Runs immediate warehouse deficit scan and transfer creation logic.
Supplier operator actions for payment bypass, broadcast, manual reconcile, and replenishment trigger.
The Empathy Engine resolves auto-order eligibility using a 4-level override cascade. The most specific level wins.
Per-variant toggle overrides all levels below
Auto-Order Intelligence — Network Adoption & Pipeline Health
Network error - is the backend running?
Enter your credentials to access the portal
Network error - is the backend running?
Select your country and enter your primary company information
Select all product categories you supply - retailers will filter by these
Warehouse location will be used for route planning and delivery logistics
Same as warehouse or head office address
Select at least one category to continue.
Enter your bank information for receiving payments from fulfilled orders.
Network error - is the backend running?
Choose how retailers will pay for fulfilled orders. You can change this later in your settings.
Configure how retailers will pay you
Operational controls by country (geofence, gateways, provider preferences).
Payment gateway keys are managed via infrastructure secrets.
Applied per delivery to the retailer invoice.
Minimum proximity for delivery completion confirmation.
